# Theme Grammar Reference

## Top-Level Structure

```
[@version(N)]
theme theme-name [extends base-theme] {
  purpose { ... }
  palette { colorName: oklch(L C H / A) }
  typography {
    fontVar: "Name", fallback
    styleKey: { size: 1rem; weight: 600; lineHeight: 1.5; tracking: 0.01em; family: var }
  }
  spacing { key: 4px }
  motion {
    durationKey: 250ms
    easingKey: cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)
  }
  elevation { key: shadow-spec }
  radius { key: 8px }
}
```

Color formats: `oklch()`, `hsl()`, `#RRGGBB`.
Extends: `theme dark extends light { ... }` — only override changed tokens.
